resources.string: Use device vibration for important taps.
Documentation, source, bugs, features, and contact.
Wallet setup could not be saved. Please try again.
Write it down before funds arrive.
Satra will generate a recovery phrase on this device. Keep it private and never share it with anyone.
The standard recovery phrase length for most wallets.
A longer recovery phrase generated from more entropy.
Use the exact passphrase, including spaces and capitalization. Leave empty if this wallet does not use one.
Adds an extra secret to this recovery phrase. It must match exactly when restoring the wallet.
A screenshot of your recovery phrase can be saved in your gallery, backups, or cloud sync. If someone gets access to those photos later, they may be able to restore and control this wallet.
Satra keeps backup confirmation explicit before the wallet can be used for real value.
I am in a private place.
I will not save screenshots or cloud notes.
I understand this phrase restores the wallet.
Add an optional four- or six-digit passcode for this device, or skip and enable it later.
A shorter passcode for quicker local unlocks.
The stronger default for protecting local access.
Continue without a passcode and enable it later.
Passcodes do not match. Enter the same digits.
Confirm the passcode before Satra uses it to protect local access.
Use the same digits from the previous screen.
Face or fingerprint unlock is optional and can be changed later in settings.
Use the device biometric prompt when opening Satra.
Satra will still keep recovery and signing local to this device.
Setup is complete. You can review security choices and supported assets from the wallet settings later.
Satra created this wallet on your device. Recovery, signing, and privacy settings are ready to use.
Satra imported this wallet on your device. You can now review accounts, assets, and security settings.
Review supported assets, add more accounts, and update security choices anytime from wallet settings.
Bring an existing wallet into Satra.
Choose the source first so the next screen can ask for only the information that belongs there.
Restore from a valid BIP39 recovery phrase.
Import one chain-specific account for signing.
Track a chain address without signing from this device.
Track a chain address without signing from this device.
Private keys and watch-only addresses belong to a specific network. Choose one supported chain before entering account data.
Satra validates the BIP39 words and checksum locally before the wallet is restored.
Enter the key for this chain.
Satra will treat this as a signing account for the selected network only.
Watch-only accounts can view activity on the selected network but cannot sign transactions.
word one word two word three…
Satra detects the BIP39 word count and validates the checksum locally.
Enter a valid BIP39 recovery phrase with 12, 15, 18, 21, or 24 words.
Word "%1$s" is not in the BIP39 English word list.
These words are valid, but the BIP39 checksum does not match.
Paste the private key for the selected chain…
Keep this private. Satra will validate the key locally before importing.
Paste the address for the selected chain…
This address can be monitored, but it cannot sign or spend from this device.
Satra will read recovery phrases, wallet addresses, and payment details from the QR code.
Point the camera at a QR code that contains a valid BIP39 recovery phrase.
Point the camera at a wallet address QR code for any supported network.
Point the camera at a wallet address or payment URI with an optional amount.
Satra uses the camera only while this scanner is open.
Align the QR code inside the frame.
That QR code does not contain a valid recovery phrase.
That QR code does not contain a supported wallet address.
That QR code does not contain a supported payment request.
That QR code is not supported yet.
Camera is not available on this device.
Follow cached prices for every supported coin and token in your selected currency.
Satra stores the latest local prices so market data can fall back to the database.
Satra will keep using cached prices and retry public market providers on the next refresh.
Market description is not available from the current public provider cache.
Choose chain visibility, balance visibility, and how assets are sorted.
Your Satra wallet is ready. Asset, account, and transaction screens will be connected as wallet core work begins.
Balances and transaction history sync from public providers configured for supported networks.
Some public providers returned partial history. Satra keeps the sync state visible and will retry on the next refresh.
No activity for this asset yet.
Satra is checking supported EVM and Bitcoin-family networks, balances, and history.
When this wallet has supported transactions, they will appear here after sync.
This transaction is not available in the current wallet history.
Create or import a wallet first so Satra can derive receive addresses for supported assets.
No receive network was found for this asset.
This receive asset is not available in the current wallet.
Start with the coin or token. If it exists on more than one chain, Satra will ask for the network next.
Network choice changes the receive address and the chain where funds must arrive.
Share only this address for %1$s on %2$s. Tokens on the same network use the same receive address.
QR code for the selected receive address.
Create or import a signing wallet before sending assets.
No sendable network was found for this asset.
This asset is not available in the current wallet.
Start with the coin or token. If it exists on more than one chain, Satra will ask for the network next.
Network choice changes the sender address, token contract, fee asset, and final transaction format.
This wallet is watch-only. It can track activity, but it has no local key to sign outgoing transactions.
No local signing key is stored for this network. Import or create a signing wallet before sending.
Check the address format before continuing.
Enter an amount greater than zero and no more than your balance.
Draft %1$s is saved as pending. Native signing and broadcast will connect through Trust Wallet Core.
The transaction could not be prepared.
Create a quiet instrument of ownership where recovery, signing, and privacy are designed around your device across supported networks.
Begin with a new wallet or bring an existing one into a native flow built around your device.
Satra follows a published network and token list so every asset shown has a source of truth.
Keep asset, network, and address context together before you share where funds should arrive.
Review the asset, network, address, fee, and activity in a calm flow before any transaction moves.
Use scan-first flows that keep the destination visible, readable, and ready for review.
Follow wallet activity with clear labels, timestamps, and network context as Satra grows.
Satra is designed around deliberate actions, clear review, and no hidden custody step.
Satra starts public from day one, with every design and code change visible as the wallet grows.
Satra security icon representing self-custody and local key protection.
Satra wallet icon representing wallet creation and import.
Satra brand mark representing supported crypto assets.
Satra receive icon representing network-aware receiving.
Satra list icon representing transaction review before sending assets.
Satra scan icon representing careful address scanning.
Satra history icon representing wallet activity context.
Satra move icon representing intentional transfers.
Satra settings icon representing open development and public review.
Manage wallets, preferences, security, notifications, and app data from one place.
Save trusted recipients locally for supported networks.
Add recipients you trust so they are easier to review before sending.
Keep this entry at the top of the address book.
Choose the local currency used for balances. Satra prices assets in USD first, then converts through free FX rates.
Choose the app language. English keys are in place and full translations will be added screen by screen.
Use system theme by default, or force light or dark mode.
Control passcode, biometrics, auto-lock, and wallet erase protection.
Verify your passcode on the next screen before removing it.
Enter the current passcode to turn off local passcode protection.
Allow biometric unlock after passcode is enabled.
Satra will require passcode or biometrics after this idle time when app lock is enabled.
Reset local wallet data after repeated passcode failures. Default is 10 attempts.
Choose whether Satra should remove local wallets and keys after repeated wrong passcode attempts.
Erase local wallet data after this many wrong passcode entries.
Lock as soon as Satra leaves the foreground.
Keep Satra open for longer sessions.
Use only on devices you control.
Choose which app alerts Satra can send.
Updates about Satra and supported network changes.
Price movement alerts for tracked assets.
Sent, received, pending, failed, and confirmed transaction updates.
Privacy policy, terms of use, and public source links.
Erase all local wallets, addresses, keys, transactions, settings, and saved contacts.
This removes every local wallet record and returns Satra to first launch.
Reset deletes wallets, private keys, recovery data, addresses, transactions, address book entries, and local settings from this device. This cannot be undone.
